name: Outcrop Silver & Gold Corporation
description: Outcrop Silver & Gold Corporation is a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on advancing high-grade silver and gold projects in Colombia. Its flagship asset is the Santa Ana high-grade silver district, where the company is actively conducting expansion drilling. In addition to its primary Colombian operations, the company maintains a portfolio of exploration projects with significant discovery potential. Led by a seasoned professional team with extensive experience in the region, Outcrop Silver is committed to identifying and developing world-class mineral deposits to create long-term value for its shareholders and stakeholders.
